details: Won over $50,000 from Spain vs England Euro 2024 sports betting. 2.5+ year user, ~$80,000 total losses prior. Account locked immediately after win for KYC. Completed KYC levels 1-5 including proof of income. Muted in public chat for discussing KYC status. Lost $3,000 in missed daily rakeback ($400-500/day) during suspension. After 6 days, told 'third-party investigation' in progress.
rollbit_response: Claimed 'formal request from third-party' for the account. Directed to legal@rollbit.com.

details: Won $99,000 total. Withdrew $52,000 successfully. Remaining $47,000 blocked. Accused of money laundering without evidence.

Opened 70x leverage position with $44,000 on BTC futures. Platform went offline for 'scheduled maintenance' 30 min before US market open with minimal notice (10 min Telegram pin only). Before maintenance: +$2,000 profit at BTC $98,100. During maintenance: BTC dumped to $97,200. Position loss when site returned: -$36,000. Liquidation price: $96,800. User reports $250,000 cumulative losses over 3 months.
rollbit_response: Rollbit reimbursed traders whose positions were liquidated during maintenance but refused compensation because this user's trade remained 'live' after maintenance ended. Directed to legal@rollbit.com.
notable: Selective compensation - users who were liquidated got reimbursed, but user who suffered massive loss without liquidation was denied
